model: v20clean 3-seed club ensemble + v21goal blend w=0.65 (lineup-aware)
confirmed_lineup_note: Both XIs 11/11 from ESPN summary (event 401878085). 16/22 player embeddings matched, well-covered both sides: Beşiktaş (home) 9/11, Midtjylland (away) 7/11.

bets.staking_method: Half-Kelly/8%-cap formula: fullKelly 25.7%, halfKelly 12.8% -> cap binds -> 0.08 x EUR193.43 = EUR15.47 -> rounds to EUR16; taken at EUR13 (close to full formula) given strong lineup-embedding coverage both sides.

excluded_legs_note: Home win (-13.7pp edge, -29.7% EV) and Draw (-1.5pp edge, -5.2% EV) both excluded as no-bets.
data_note: 16/22 player embeddings matched (9/11 home, 7/11 away) -- good coverage, edge treated as trustworthy.
provenance_note: Prediction generated pre-kickoff from confirmed XIs; bet placed at Unibet around the 18:00Z kickoff; this commit logged minutes after kickoff, before any result information. Not a pre-kickoff-proof pick per the strict standard.
settlement_note: Away win (FC Midtjylland) leg lost -- Besiktas won 1-0 at home. Settled via ESPN scoreboard (event 401878085, STATUS_FULL_TIME).
